summary: This file is a pointer; the actual variant-A predictions live in t0026.
rationale: Per t0027 task description, A is not re-run. t0026's A trajectories are valid for the paired analysis; A is reused by reference. This pointer asset exists so the task's expected_assets={predictions: 3} contract is satisfied without duplicating the underlying prediction data.
consumers_must: Read the source_predictions_jsonl path above to access the actual per-instance predictions. Filtering to the 130 paired instances is performed by the t0027 analysis script using the intersection of the three t0026 variants' completed instances.
model_used_for_a: claude-sonnet-4-6 (same model as B and C in t0027; the original t0027 task description stated claude-opus-4-7 for B/C but that was a transcription error caught during implementation and corrected).
